commands.review_summary:
The PR updates Ollama provider discovery to prefer resolved discovery keys for cloud endpoints when the configured API key is an env marker, while preserving local synthetic auth behavior.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main returns the configured `OLLAMA_API_KEY` marker before the resolved credential in the Ollama discovery helper, matching the linked auth failure. I did not run a live Ollama Cloud request in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blocker is contributor or maintainer real-behavior proof for an auth-provider path, not a narrow code repair that ClawSweeper should generate.

target.title: Fix Ollama cloud API key discovery
target.body:
Fixes #85023

## Summary
- Teach Ollama provider discovery to use `discoveryApiKey` as the real resolved credential for cloud endpoints.
- Keep `OLLAMA_API_KEY` and `ollama-local` as marker values, preserving synthetic local auth for local/private Ollama hosts.
- Add catalog regressions for cloud env-marker resolution, cloud resolved discovery keys, and local marker preservation.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/ollama/provider-discovery.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/ollama/src/discovery-shared.test.ts src/agents/models-config.providers.auth-provenance.test.ts`
- `npx --yes pnpm@11.1.0 exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/ollama/src/discovery-shared.ts extensions/ollama/provider-discovery.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode auto`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Ollama cloud provider discovery no longer returns the literal `OLLAMA_API_KEY` marker when a real resolved discovery credential is available.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout on macOS, Node v25.9.0, workspace dependencies installed with `pnpm@11.1.0` via `npx`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/ollama/provider-discovery.test.ts`; `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/ollama/src/discovery-shared.test.ts src/agents/models-config.providers.auth-provenance.test.ts`; targeted `oxfmt --check`; `git diff --check`; autoreview.

Evidence after fix: New regression tests cover `baseUrl: "https://ollama.com/v1"` with configured `apiKey: "OLLAMA_API_KEY"` and resolver `{ apiKey: "OLLAMA_API_KEY", discoveryApiKey: "real-secret" }`, plus cloud without explicit `apiKey` and local synthetic-auth preservation.

Observed result after fix: Focused Ollama discovery tests passed, with 17/17 tests green; the follow-up auth/discovery tests passed, with 49/49 tests green; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.

What was not tested: No live Ollama Cloud request was made because no real `OLLAMA_API_KEY` credential was available in this checkout.
target.author: twilighttechie
